header: Value
Value

UPS General Service
Offering
Y

A minimum of 10 physical labels is allowed for certification per printer. If you're
using more than 1 UPS service for shipping, see the rows that follow on how you
can split the 10 labels into sets.
rows:
If only 1 UPS General Service is used - all 10 labels provided must be for that
particular service

If 2 UPS General Services are used, provide 2 sets of 5 labels (each set with it's own
service).

If 3 UPS General Services are used, provide 3 sets of labels - .e.g. (3) labels with one
service; (3) labels with another service and (4) labels with the final service).
If 5 UPS General Services are used, provide 5 sets - 2 labels for each service.
Where N can be any number from 1 - 100

The number of UPS Accounts used does not affect the total number of labels sub-
mitted, but all UPS account numbers must be listed on the submission form.
General services = 10*N labels . (Where N is the number of printers used).
